provider_scope: Self-hosting provider-backed GitHub issue candidate remains bounded to preproduction review; no production execution is authorized.
budget_period: single bounded provider execution candidate review
rate_limit_boundary: Stop or escalate if provider calls would exceed three calls or if rate-limit state is unknown.
quota_boundary: Stop or escalate if token/call quota cannot be checked before execution.
billing_boundary: No autonomous paid execution; budget owner review is required before cost-bearing external provider writes.
stop_conditions: Stop if estimated cost exceeds USD 1.00 or actual ceiling would exceed USD 2.00.
Stop if token, call, retry, quota, or rate-limit boundary is unknown.
not_proven: This boundary does not prove actual provider billing correctness, actual quota enforcement, provider semantic correctness, or production execution safety.
